statement: He who has a why can bear almost any how.
author: Friedrich Nietzsche
primary_source: Jenseits von Gut und Böse §151 / Twilight aphorism tradition — canonical in 'Maxims and Arrows' Twilight of the Idols
verified_via: Nietzsche Götzen-Dämmerung 'Maximen und Pfeile' §8 — verified; NOT Frankl
